summary: CRIT-201 passThreshold 'PROP-FEED-S5-005 mock-emitter integration test PASS' over-claims: actual test verifies only single-event handler synchronicity, not the cross-event ordering / 5-arm exhaustive dispatch the contract description promises.
description: The contract's CRIT-201 description states '5-arm EditingSessionStateDto wire shape exhaustively dispatched (Idle/Editing/Saving/Switching/SaveFailed)' and its passThreshold names PROP-FEED-S5-005 as the integration verification. verification-architecture.md §14 line 709 specifies four sub-conditions for PROP-FEED-S5-005: (a) vi.spyOn(feedReducerModule, 'feedReducer') with assertion in spy callback that editingSessionState is observable; (b) two synchronous emits ('editing_session_state_changed' THEN 'feed_state_changed') with no await between them; (c) expect(feedReducerSpy).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1) AND the spy-callback assertion of (a); (d) handler grep audit (delegated to S5-012). The actual test in feed-list-editing-channel.dom.vitest.ts (lines 54-83) emits ONLY 'editing_session_state_changed' (single event, no feed_state_changed), uses NO feedReducer spy, asserts only that the channel handler synchronously updates an `observed` local variable, and emits ONLY the 'editing' arm — Idle/Saving/Switching/SaveFailed are never exercised. The test therefore validates a degraded variant of (a) only; (b)/(c)/(d) are absent. Phase 3 will see 'PROP-FEED-S5-005 PASS' and approve, but the underlying spec promise (cross-event ordering + 5-arm coverage) is not verified.

additionalEvidence.description: PROP-FEED-S5-005 spec text: '(a) test は vi.spyOn(feedReducerModule, \'feedReducer\') で feedReducer を spy し...; (b) test は 同期的に両イベントを emit する: mockEmit(\'editing_session_state_changed\', editingPayload); mockEmit(\'feed_state_changed\', feedPayload); ...; (c) emit 後 expect(feedReducerSpy).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1) ... (d) editingSessionChannel ハンドラ内に await を含まないことは PROP-FEED-S5-012 で別途 grep 監査'

CRIT-201 description '5-arm EditingSessionStateDto wire shape exhaustively dispatched (Idle/Editing/Saving/Switching/SaveFailed)' + passThreshold 'PROP-FEED-S5-005 mock-emitter integration test PASS' — neither '5-arm exhaustive' nor 'cross-event ordering' is verified by the actual test.

remediation: Either (A) tighten PROP-FEED-S5-005 test to match its verification-architecture.md spec (add feedReducer spy, dual-event synchronous emit, and 5-arm parameterization), or (B) amend CRIT-201 passThreshold + description to acknowledge that PROP-FEED-S5-005 covers only handler synchronicity and that 5-arm cross-event ordering is verified manually / deferred to Phase 6. Option (A) is preferred to maintain Phase 3 mechanical evaluability.
